title: [release-1.29] CVE-2025-49713 x/crypto, Buildah to 1.29.7
body:
Bump golang.org/x/crypto to v0.43.0 to fix CVE-2025-49713

Also bump Go to v1.24.* and adjust tests and .cirrus.yml

Partially Addresses when vendored into Podman:
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-67053,
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-67036,
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-67070,
https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-67090

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-134782, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-134786

comments.body: Thanks for taking care of this @TomSweeneyRedHat that was very kind of you to help out.  The changes LGTM. I didn't double-check the re-vendoring, I'm assuming `go` took care of that properly.
@cevich it's self-serving.  I need this for OCP land, too.  Thanks for the review!
